strategy: He takes +30% from Life and resists Death 62%. Hit with Life or a non-Death school.

The core mechanic: two Hostages each carry a 6,000 Damage Absorb aura. If you kill Mr. Cane while a Hostage is still in combat, he fully heals everyone and recasts the auras. Get the Hostages out first.
Remove a Hostage by dealing more than 6,000 in one hit (which force-exits them from combat), or use Drain spells, which pass straight through the absorb and trigger the exit.
Do NOT try to strip the Restraints aura; removing it also triggers his full-heal cheat.
Once both Hostages are cleared, focus Mr. Cane. Expect a Poison every third round; carry Triage or heal through it. Blade up, drain or burst the Hostages out, then land a Life hit on Cane.
cheatNotes: At Round 1 both Hostages get a 6,000 Damage Absorb aura. You must remove the Hostages before killing Cane, not just chip them.
That absorb can also stop criticals from doubling and block trap activation on the Hostages. Big single hits or drains are the way through.
Kill Cane while a Hostage is still in combat and he full-heals everyone and recasts the auras. Clear both Hostages first.
Removing the absorb aura also triggers his full-heal. Never strip it; remove the Hostages themselves instead.
A hit dealing more than 0 after the 6,000 absorb (over 6,000 in one hit) forces the Hostage to Exit Combat. That is how you clear them.
Drain spells bypass the absorb entirely and trigger the Exit Combat. Drains are the easy way to remove Hostages.
Every third round he casts Poison. Carry Triage or heal through the DoT.
